notes:
Rating silver as sometimes it runs fine, sometimes has a terrible frame rate, and, sometimes just locks up/stops rendering (although the machine can be ssh'd into to stop the process). It's not apparent what or why this happens, but it does. 

When it's working though, it works well.
title: Sairento VR

notes: Valve Index, no issues. Performance is not great but I fear this is no different on windows, the main performance hit is when too many bullets are in the air at the same time, which you'll only encounter at the highest of difficulties.
title: Sairento VR

notes: Until first mission all seem to work (big board in 'dojo', tutorial mission, 1st mission), but 2nd mission refuses to load/start each time I tried and game quits (crashes)
title: Sairento VR
